raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm can reach the frontal face of box_1 without collision. Sufficient clearance exists in front of the box for the end-effector to press against it while box_2 remains on top.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly held against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing accidental movement while box_2 is detached."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2’s frontal face is unobstructed. With box_1 stabilized, the right arm can approach frontally, apply a hugging grip around the box, and apply enough upward force to break the tape attachment.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is securely held by the right arm and detached from box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "table region right of box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Vertically",
    "Precondition": "The area on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30 cm × 30 cm) to accommodate box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed upright on the cleared region of the table, no longer in contact with box_1, and the right arm is free."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 has been removed. Both arms have unimpeded lateral access to the sides of box_1, and there is vertical clearance above the box for a lift.",
    "Postcondition": "The robot is holding the darker box (box_1) securely with both arms, lifted slightly above the tabletop—successfully completing the ‘pick up the darker box’ task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm can reach the frontal face of box_1 without collision. Sufficient clearance exists in front of the box for the end-effector to press against it while box_2 remains on top.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly held against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing accidental movement while box_2 is detached.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2’s frontal face is unobstructed. With box_1 stabilized, the right arm can approach frontally, apply a hugging grip around the box, and apply enough upward force to break the tape attachment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is securely held by the right arm and detached from box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The area on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30 cm × 30 cm) to accommodate box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed upright on the cleared region of the table, no longer in contact with box_1, and the right arm is free.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 has been removed. Both arms have unimpeded lateral access to the sides of box_1, and there is vertical clearance above the box for a lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The robot is holding the darker box (box_1) securely with both arms, lifted slightly above the tabletop—successfully completing the ‘pick up the darker box’ task.
